name: antigravity-greenlight
description: Give your AI agent the green light — auto-accept file edits, terminal commands, and chat actions with granular control
author: codavidgarcia

commands.title: Antigravity Greenlight: Toggle Status Bar Visibility

greenlight.autoStart.description: Start auto-accepting automatically when VS Code opens.

greenlight.autoApproveEdits.description: Auto-approve file edits from AI agents.

greenlight.autoApproveTerminal.description: Auto-approve terminal commands from AI agents.

greenlight.autoApproveChat.description: Auto-approve chat and tool invocations from AI agents.

greenlight.enableCommandPolling.description: Enable active command polling for edge cases not covered by VS Code settings.

greenlight.maxAgentRequests.description: Maximum agent turn requests before VS Code prompts 'Continue?'. Higher values reduce interruptions.

greenlight.additionalAcceptCommands.markdownDescription: Additional VS Code command IDs to execute during polling. Use `Antigravity Greenlight: Run Diagnostics` to discover available commands.

greenlight.adaptivePolling.description: Reduce polling frequency when the editor is idle to minimize resource usage.

greenlight.showNotifications.description: Show information messages when toggling auto-accept on/off.

greenlight.showStatusBar.description: Show the Greenlight status bar item. Use 'Antigravity Greenlight: Toggle Status Bar Visibility' to change this.

greenlight.terminalProtection.description: Monitor terminal commands and immediately kill any that match blocked patterns. Requires VS Code 1.93+.

greenlight.blockedPatterns.markdownDescription: Terminal command patterns that will be immediately killed if detected. Uses case-insensitive substring matching. Requires `greenlight.terminalProtection` to be enabled.

chat.agent.autoApprove.markdownDescription: When enabled, agent tool-use requests (file access, commands) are auto-approved without confirmation dialogs. Managed by Antigravity Greenlight.

chat.tools.autoApprove.markdownDescription: Auto-approve all chat tool invocations. Managed by Antigravity Greenlight.

geminicodeassist.autoAcceptToolUse.markdownDescription: Auto-accept Gemini Code Assist tool-use requests. Managed by Antigravity Greenlight.
